category_sources: source_facts.description says symlinks is a symbolic link maintenance utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.repo use the project name symlinks.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies symbolic-link maintenance; source_facts.executables lists a command-line utility.
